meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Accelerate SaaS Development for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop manual coding. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship enterprise-grade SaaS apps in hours, not weeks. Advanced tutorial for pros.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity template eliminates boilerplate by orchestrating production-ready architecture via AI-driven scaffolding. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate the entire development lifecycle—from schema definition to deployment—allowing you to bypass hours of repetitive setup and deliver high-performance, client-ready applications at lightning speed.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and you’re still wrestling with project initialization, environment variables, and boilerplate auth modules. Every hour spent on foundational plumbing is an hour lost on high-value feature development. You aren't just losing time; you're losing the competitive edge that separates a high-margin engineer from a code-monkey.

Relief has arrived in the form of the Antigravity project template. It is not just a starter kit; it is an opinionated, battle-tested framework designed to be consumed by AI agents. When you combine this with Claude Code, you transition from 'writing code' to 'architecting solutions,' effectively turning your terminal into a factory that churns out production-grade software on demand.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Workspace
steps.description: Establish the foundational structure to ensure the AI agent understands the project boundaries and dependency tree.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js, TypeScript, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Schema with AI-Assisted Modeling
steps.description: Use the template's schema engine to generate database migrations and types simultaneously, preventing drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including tables for profiles, subscriptions, and project_data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file schema.ts --task 'generate migrations for new tenant entities'

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Stop writing manual API handlers. Use the template's internal generator to create CRUD routes linked to your schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for the project_data table with appropriate RLS policies for multi-tenant isolation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'scaffold API routes for project_data with RLS'

steps.title: Component Logic Injection
steps.description: Inject UI components that adhere to the template's design system, ensuring visual consistency across the app.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a dashboard component that fetches project_data and displays it in a responsive data grid.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file src/components/dashboard.tsx --task 'add data grid view'

steps.title: End-to-End Test Orchestration
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to write tests that verify the integration between the template's auth and your custom logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright tests for the user authentication flow and verify tenant isolation in the dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate E2E test suite for auth and tenant isolation'

pro_tips: Always run Claude Code with a specific --context-file that contains your project's architectural guidelines to maintain strict coding standards.
Use Antigravity's 'ghost-mode' to preview changes in a headless environment before applying them to your main branch.
Inject your own custom middleware into the Antigravity boot sequence to handle global logging without modifying individual route files.
Leverage the template's built-in observability hooks by piping logs directly into Claude Code's debug loop for instant fix generation.
Maintain a 'prompt-library' of your most effective Antigravity interactions to ensure consistent output quality across multiple client projects.
content.next_steps: Once your project is scaffolded, run your first deployment to Vercel or Railway. Use the generated documentation to onboard your client and move to the maintenance phase.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the boilerplate and start shipping. You have the tools, the workflow, and the strategy to dominate your freelance market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
